site.plus_half_requires: Add authenticated end-to-end coverage for preview-to-full transitions, exports, and search-driven chapter entry points.
Tie future premium tiers, citations, and admin-only tools to explicit server-side entitlements instead of UI-level assumptions.
Add signed-in filtering by source hierarchy, institution, and chapter evidence mix without exposing locked citations anonymously.
Add evidence-tier, source-only, and chapter-type filters with signed-in highlighting for source matches.
Reduce the main vendor bundle and tighten 390px navigation density without diluting the editorial hierarchy.

growth.plus_half_requires: Replace queue-only capture with portal-backed HubSpot forms, double opt-in, and workflow-level segmentation.
Connect Search Console and add structured data coverage for remaining non-chapter editorial pages.
Verify GA4 custom dimensions in production and map HubSpot lifecycle stages to a live conversion dashboard.
Add thank-you landing pages and campaign-level attribution on donation and recurring-support returns.
Send locked search/source visitors into a dedicated post-signup redirect and test that funnel against the current gate copy.

p0_resolved: Public source-library payloads were removed from preview chapter responses.
Anonymous search no longer returns source-only matches that require authenticated source access.
